manifest.falsifier: No seed strategy reduces seed-to-gold distance, no recovery policy improves recovery rate while preserving more correct structure than full remask, or plan features silently alter legal candidate membership.
manifest.hypothesis: Plan-conditioned initialization (gold or learned) and conflict-localized recovery together lift X22 closer to acceptable programs than minimal seed or coarse remask controls, under matched seed/edit/search/verifier budgets.

search_config.notes: fixture-only: no live X22 beam search is executed

seed_arms.description: Canonical minimal X22 seed; baseline for search distance.
Deterministic train-set archetype/role frequency prior seed.
Learned archetype + role set merged into gold topology/bindings.
Fully learned plan seed (chain topology; wiring approximation).
Gold binding factor substituted into predicted plan; diagnostic.
Full gold plan oracle seed; diagnostic ceiling.
Best leakage-safe retrieved valid prototype (SPV1-04 hybrid).
Retrieved prototype reranked by learned plan factors.
